name: Santa Sandwich Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Uncooked rolled oats (quick or Old-fashioned)
Green or red food coloring, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter, sugar, and vanilla until creamy.
2. In a separate bowl, combine flour, oats, and salt; mix well.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture; mix well.
4. Divide the dough in half. Shape each half into a roll that is 2 inches in diameter and about 5 inches long. Wrap each roll in plastic wrap and chill for at least 3 hours.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F.
6. Unwrap one roll of dough; cut into 1/4-inch slices.
7. Place the slices about 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets. Repeat with the remaining roll.
8. Bake for 12 to 14 minutes, or until edges are light golden brown. Let cool for 1 minute on the cookie sheet before removing them to a wire rack. Allow cookies to cool completely.
9. Tint frosting with food coloring if desired.
10. Spread frosting on one cooled cookie and top with another. Roll edge of frosting in decorations. Repeat with remaining cookies.
11. Store tightly covered. Yield: About 2 dozen sandwich cookies.
